monster.name: Alchemical Homunculus [5.5e]
monster.languages: Understands the languages you know, telepathy 30 ft.

trait.name: Hit Points
trait.text: 5 plus 5 times your Alchemist Level (it has a number of Hit Point Dice [d4s] equal to your Alchemist Level)

trait.name: Evasion
trait.text: If the homunculus is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the homunculus instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

action.name: Bite
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2 plus your Intelligence modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage, and the target is Poisoned for 1 minute. If the attack roll exceeds the target's Constitution score by 5 or more, the target falls Unconscious until it takes damage or another creature uses an Action to shake it awake.

trait.name: Gear
trait.text: Leather Armor, Alchemist's Supplies, Herbalism Kit

trait.name: Alchemist
trait.text:
The apothecary knows how to create the following Alchemical Items (save DC 14):
• Alchemical Items: Alchemist's Fire, Basic Acid, Basic Oil, Antitoxin, Gravebane, Healing Draught, Perfume, Restful Candle, Soap, Tanglefoot Bag • Potions (1/Day): Potion of Healing

trait.name: Sweet Succor
trait.text: The apothecary has Advantage on Wisdom (Medicine) checks it makes to stabilize dying creatures and adds its Intelligence modifier to one healing roll of an Alchemical Item it creates.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The apothecary makes two attacks, using Alchemist's Fire or Tanglefoot Bag in any combination.

action.name: Alchemist's Fire
action.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., one target. Failure: 5 (2d4) Fire damage at the target is burning.

action.name: Tanglefoot Bag
action.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., one target. Hit: Grappled (escape DC 10) for 1 hour and Restrained while Grappled this way.

action.name: Catalyze (Requires 5 Cp in Raw Materials) (Bonus Action)
action.text: The apothecary makes an Alchemical Item it knows how to create.

action.name: Healing Draught (Bonus Action)
action.text: The consumer can spend and roll its Hit Dice and regain a number of Hit Points equal to (the roll plus 4). The maximum number of Hit Dice it can spend this way is equal to its Constitution modifier (minimum 1).

trait.name: Alchemist
trait.text:
The apothecary knows how to create the following Alchemical Items (save DC 14):
• Alchemical Items: Alchemist's Fire, Basic Acid, Basic Oil, Healing Draught, Perfume, Soap, Tanglefoot Bag, Thunderstone • Potions (1/Day): Potion of Fire Breath

trait.name: Exploding Damage
trait.text: Whenever the fulminaire rolls the highest value on any of the damage dice of an Alchemical item, it deals one extra die of damage.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The salbenist makes two attacks, using Alchemist's Fire, Levin Shell, or Thunderstone in any combination.

action.name: Alchemist's Fire (Quartz)
action.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., each creature in a 10-foot Sphere. Failure: 5 (2d4) Fire damage at the target is burning.

action.name: Levin Shell (Nut Shells)
action.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., one target. Failure: 7 (2d6) Lightning damage and Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws until the end of the fulminare's next turn. Success or Failure: The ground within 10 feet of the target becomes Difficult Terrain.

action.name: Thunderstone (Saltpeter)
action.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., one target. Failure: 7 (2d6) [Roll d6: 1 Cold, 2 Lightning, 3 Necrotic, 4 Psychic, 5 Radiant, 6 Force] damage and Deafened until the end of the fulminaire's next turn. Creatures Deafened this way have Disadvantage on Initiative rolls.

action.name: Catalyze (Bonus Action)
action.text: The fulminaire makes an Alchemical Item it knows how to create.

trait.name: Alchemist
trait.text:
Alchemist. The apothecary knows how to create the following Alchemical Items (save DC 14):
• Alchemical Items: Alchemist's Fire, Basic Acid, Basic Oil, Bladefire Oil, Ghostflame Oil, Healing Draught, Perfume, Soap, Tanglefoot Bag • Potions (1/Day): Oil of Slipperiness

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The salbenist makes two attacks, using Anointed Longsword or Alchemist's Fire in any combination.

action.name: Anointed Longsword
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10+4) Slashing damage, plus (2d4) Fire damage if coated with Bladefire Oil.

action.name: Alchemist's Fire
action.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, range 40 ft., one target. Failure: 5 (2d4) Fire damage at the target is burning.

action.name: Catalyze (Bonus Action)
action.text: The salbenist makes an Alchemical Item it knows how to create.

action.name: Anoint (Bonus Action)
action.text: The salbenist wills Bladefire Oil onto its Anointed Longsword, causing it to deal an extra 5 (2d4) Fire damage on a hit.
